overall_summary: ElizaOS completed major infrastructure milestones for the Cloud Apps data-plane while simultaneously facing community scrutiny over financial transparency and governance ties. Technical progress focuses on modular infrastructure-as-code deployments and the integration of world models and physical robotics ecosystems.
key_facts: PR #8293 implementing the per-tenant-isolated Eliza Cloud Apps data-plane was merged by NubsCarson.
The Eliza Cloud staging environment was stabilized through modular infrastructure-as-code deployments and the activation of APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED.
Eliza Foundation reportedly allocated 750k CAD into a placement with Secure Blockchain Dev Corp alongside a defendant in an active New York legal case.
A proposal was submitted to integrate elizaOS with the peaq network to enable autonomous reasoning for 3 million IoT and robotics devices.
Core developer Odilitime confirmed that project development for version 2.x is centralizing on the 'develop' branch rather than the 'main' branch.
A local gRPC pipeline was developed by carlgatz to optimize AI token processing for high-volume data spikes, achieving sub-millisecond latency.
Infrastructure security was updated to fetch tenant DSNs from shared Terraform outputs and route file operations through sudo.
A critical resource leak in Eliza Cloud was resolved where deleted apps failed to drop Postgres instances or release cluster slots.
open_questions: Is Shaw doing okay? I haven't seen him commit any new code recently.
Are the bugs on Eliza Cloud about to be fixed?
Will it affect the launch plan?
Have you guys run a small-scale pilot yet?

new_issues_prs.title: release: promote develop → main (Cloud V2 sync)
new_issues_prs.author: standujar
new_issues_prs.significance: Critical sync to promote Cloud V2 stack changes to the production environment.

new_issues_prs.title: refactor(lifeops): split plugin-lifeops into focused plugins + plugin-personal-assistant
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Massive refactor of a 7.5K-LOC monolith into modular, specialized plugins to improve framework flexibility.

new_issues_prs.title: Eliza Cloud Apps: scaling + ingress gaps before go-live
new_issues_prs.author: NubsCarson
new_issues_prs.significance: P0 audit identifying critical blockers in ingress and database connection caps before production launch.

overall_focus.claim: Development focus shifted toward establishing a scalable and secure multi-tenant cloud foundation with automated database and hosting management.

discord_updates.summary: Substantial community concern regarding financial transparency and potential exit liquidity strategies involving Secure Blockchain Dev Corp. Moderator acknowledgment of scam bot issues.
Technical discussions on implementing world models using Google Vertex/Genie and resolving version 1.7.2 update sticks by switching to the develop branch.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users encountered 400/401 errors on Eliza Cloud signups, leading to an escalation for tenant invitation fixes.

strategic_insights.insight: The proposed peaq integration represents a pivot toward the 'Physical AI' narrative, moving beyond digital-only agents.
implications_or_questions: Does the framework have sufficient safety protocols for real-world robotics?

strategic_insights.insight: The heavy reliance on the 'develop' branch over standard releases indicates a high-velocity but potentially unstable development cycle.
implications_or_questions: When will the 2.x line be considered stable for the main branch?

market_analysis.observation: High community awareness and documentation of circular fund flows and Canadian micro-cap rebranding strategies.
market_analysis.relevance: Increases institutional risk and may impact community trust or project funding in the long term.
